executives.name: James Askew
executives.background: James Askew is a mining engineer with over 40 years of experience in the resources industry. He has served as a director and executive for numerous international mining companies and has extensive experience in technical and corporate management.

executives.name: Jim Askew
executives.background: Mr. Askew is a mining engineer with over 40 years’ experience as a Director and Chief Executive Officer of Australian and international publicly listed mining companies.
